evidence: "Dora is always thumbs up for the education of the kids..."
"Kids love it. Keeps them entertained over and over."
"Very good visuals. The kids love it."

"A bit expensive. But good show for the kids."

"All Seasons of Sesame Street are awesome!"
"Very good visuals. The kids love it."
"The locations are luxurious and very UK."
"This series keeps getting better and better. It is awesome that it is included with the yearly Prime subscription."
"It shows the lives of the 'upper' and 'lower' classes in a hotel setting. I watch this series to wind down after a long day at work and it has been quite therapeutic."

summary: The user has a strong preference for children's educational content, particularly favoring shows like Dora and Sesame Street. They appreciate simple narratives that are engaging for kids, with a focus on fast pacing and visual appeal, while showing some sensitivity to production quality.
